---
name: hello-world
description: A simple ascii formatted Hello Github Copilot message when user propmts "hello world" or similar greetings.
argument-hint: Try "hello world", "hi copilot", or "greetings"
user-invocable: true
disable-model-invocation: true
---

## Instructions

When the user says "hello world" or similar greetings, respond with the following ascii formatted message:

```
 _   _      _ _         __        __         _     _
| | | | ___| | | ___    \ \      / /__  _ __| | __| | ___
| |_| |/ _ \ | |/ _ \    \ \ /\ / / _ \| '__| |/ _` |/ _ \
|  _| |  __/ | | (_) |    \ V  V / (_) | |  | | (_| | (_) |
|_| |_|\___|_|_|\___/      \_/\_/ \___/|_|  |_|\__,_|\___/
```

## Example Prompts:

- "hello world"
- "hi copilot"
- "greetings"
- "say hello"
- "hello there"
- "hey copilot"
